summary: Tested IMEX AI full-stack platform. 10/10 backend pytest tests pass (100%). Frontend flows mostly work but AI Assistant page crashes with React runtime error on streaming due to a race condition between getChatHistory and SSE delta updates.

ui_bugs.issue: React runtime crash: 'TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading content)'. Full red-screen overlay appears after sending a chat message. SSE deltas continue arriving but UI is unmounted/broken so users see no streamed reply.

integration_issues.issue: Race condition: send() optimistically appends [user, emptyAssistant] then SSE deltas mutate copy[copy.length-1].content. Meanwhile useEffect getChatHistory(session).then(d => setMessages(d.messages || [])) resolves AFTER send started and OVERWRITES messages with the (possibly empty) history. The next streaming delta then runs copy[copy.length-1].content on an empty/mismatched array, throwing undefined.content.

action_items: Fix AIAssistant race condition. Recommended fix in src/pages/AIAssistant.jsx useEffect (line 33-35): only seed history if local messages array is empty AND merge instead of overwrite. E.g.: getChatHistory(session).then(d => setMessages(prev => prev.length === 0 ? (d.messages || []) : prev)).catch(()=>{}). Additionally harden the streaming delta handler to guard against an empty/missing last item: const last = copy[copy.length - 1]; if (!last) return m; copy[copy.length - 1] = { role: 'assistant', content: (last.content || '') + payload.delta };
critical_code_review_comments: AIAssistant.jsx line 34: setMessages(d.messages || []) unconditionally overwrites local state, breaking any in-flight streaming - core RCA of the crash.
AIAssistant.jsx lines 69-76 & 78-82: SSE delta reducer assumes copy[copy.length - 1] always exists and has .content; should defensively guard.
server.py: chat history is stored AFTER LLM stream completes — if client disconnects mid-stream the partial assistant content is lost. Acceptable for MVP but worth noting.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — should migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers.

No data-testid on the suggestion chip buttons in AIAssistant (lines 119-127); makes targeting suggestion-chip flows fragile (the 'click suggestion chip' part of the spec could not be deterministically asserted).
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 10 opportunities on startup (verified). No additional seed needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid - all 10 pytest cases pass including SSE streaming and history. Frontend tested at 1920x900: Landing → /dashboard & /opportunities navigation works, sidebar nav for all 6 routes works with correct page selectors, Landed Cost calculator renders $1,471 total correctly, Import vs Local + Profit Mode both return correct numbers. ONLY blocker is the AIAssistant crash described above. After main agent fixes the race condition, re-test only /assistant: open page, send a question, verify a streamed reply appears in [data-testid='assistant-messages'], then reload the page and confirm history is restored without crashing, then send another message to verify streaming still works post-history-load.
rca of the issue: RCA for AIAssistant crash: On mount, useEffect(33-35) fires getChatHistory(session) async. If the user (or test) clicks send before the history promise resolves, send() does setMessages(m => [...m, user, assistant]) producing length=2. When history.then resolves it calls setMessages(d.messages || []) — replacing the array with whatever the server returned (often [] on a fresh browser session). Streaming SSE deltas then run setMessages with copy = [...m]; copy[copy.length - 1].content + payload.delta. With m=[] the expression copy[-1] is undefined so reading .content throws 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading content)' inside React's reducer, triggering the red error overlay. Reproduction: 1) Open /assistant in a fresh browser (clear localStorage). 2) Within ~1 second of page load, click a suggestion chip or type & send. 3) Red error overlay appears. Mitigation: only seed messages from history if local list is empty, AND defensively guard the streaming reducer (see action_items).
